sizing_rule.note: Multi-asset portfolio optimization using expected returns (U_i), covariance matrix (COV_i,j), and leverage constraint (L) to solve for optimal weights (X_i). Constraint: sum(X_i)=1. Author silent on optimal_f value and kelly_fraction. Mathematical formula provided but numerical parameters not specified—requires calculation from input data.

source_rule_text: Allocate portfolio weights across multiple securities by solving a system of linear equations that incorporates expected returns, covariances between securities, and leverage constraints to achieve a target expected portfolio return.
